title: Bloom Energy Stock: Valuation Analysis After 1511% Surge
text: Bloom Energy stock has surged 1,511% over the past year, with current price at $277.47 and market cap at $86 billion. Q1 2026 revenue reached $751 million, up 130% year-over-year, with gross margin at 31.5%, up 2.8 percentage points annually. 2026 revenue guidance of $3.4-$3.8 billion implies approximately 80% YoY growth. The company trades at more than 28 times sales, representing a valuation multiple that assumes Bloom's growth story remains robust for years to come. Strong demand from AI data centers represents the primary catalyst, with major partnerships including Oracle (2.8 gigawatt agreement), Brookfield Asset Management ($5 billion partnership), and American Electric Power (1 gigawatt commitment). The core warning is that a lot is priced in with very little room for error. Rather than predicting where the stock heads next, disciplined investing emphasizes sitting out a stock you don't fully understand at a price you can't defend isn't a missed opportunity but represents discipline.
